affinity.description: If specified, the pod's scheduling constraints

annotations.description: Annotations is an unstructured key value map stored with a resource that may be set by external tools to store and retrieve arbitrary metadata

defaultPrefix.description: The prefix to prepend to all metrics exported to Graphite

grafanaDashboard.description: Allows to create Grafana dashboard for graphite-remote-adapter

image.description:
Graphite remote adapter image to deploy.
Default: ghcr.io/netcracker/qubership-graphite-remote-adapter:main

labels.description: Map of string keys and values that can be used to organize and categorize (scope and select) objects

name.description: A name of a microservice to deploy with. This name will be used as name of the microservice deployment and in labels

nodeSelector.description: Allow define which Nodes the Pods are scheduled on

priorityClassName.description: PriorityClassName assigned to the Pods to prevent them from evicting. Ref: https://kubernetes.io/docs/concepts/configuration/pod-priority-preemption/#podpriorityclass

readUrl.description: The URL of the remote Graphite Web server to send samples to

resources.description: The resources describes the compute resource requests and limits for single Pod. Ref: https://kubernetes.io/docs/user-guide/compute-resources/

limits.description: The maximum amount of compute resources allowed. Ref: https://kubernetes.io/docs/user-guide/compute-resources/#meaning-of-cpu-and-memory-resource-requests-and-limits

cpu.description: The maximum amount of CPU allowed. Ref: https://kubernetes.io/docs/concepts/configuration/manage-resources-containers/#meaning-of-cpu

memory.description: The maximum amount of memory allowed. Ref: https://kubernetes.io/docs/concepts/configuration/manage-resources-containers/#meaning-of-memory

requests.description: The minimum amount of compute resources required. Ref: https://kubernetes.io/docs/user-guide/compute-resources/#meaning-of-cpu-and-memory-resource-requests-and-limits

cpu.description: The minimum amount of CPU required. Ref: https://kubernetes.io/docs/concepts/configuration/manage-resources-containers/#meaning-of-cpu

memory.description: The minimum amount of memory required. Ref: https://kubernetes.io/docs/concepts/configuration/manage-resources-containers/#meaning-of-memory

securityContext.description: SecurityContext holds pod-level security attributes. The parameters are required if a Pod Security Policy is enabled for Kubernetes cluster and required if a Security Context Constraints is enabled for Openshift cluster

runAsUser.description: The UID to run the entrypoint of the container process. Defaults to user specified in image metadata if unspecified.

fsGroup.description: A special supplemental group that applies to all containers in a pod. If unset, the Kubelet will not modify the ownership and permissions of any volume.

install.description: Allow to disable create ServiceMonitor CR for graphite-remote-adapter during deploy

tolerations.description: Tolerations allow the pods to schedule onto nodes with matching taints

writeCarbonAddress.description: The host:port of the Graphite server to send samples to
